Details: Two studies assessing the effectiveness of adsorptive media also reported isotherm data for the removal of lithium. Freundlich K values ranged from 2.854 to 3.777 (mg/g) (L/mg) were reported in an isotherm study using manganese dioxide cages for the removal of lithium [2739]. Date pits with and without the addition of an ionic liquid and cellulose were also studied, with lower Freundlich K values being reported in pits containing the ionic liquid and cellulose (Freundlich K value ranged from 114.9 to 221.6 as opposed to 128.8 to 529.8) [2742].
